have h1 : M.encard ∈ {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} := by 
    refine' ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
  have h2 : M.encard ≤ (sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} : ℕ∞) := by 
    apply sSup_le
    exact h1
  rw [show (sSup {n | ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ n = M'.encard} : ℕ∞) = ν(G) by 
      simp [MatchingNumber]
  ] at h2
  exact h2

∑ H ∈ KConnectedComponents G k, KConnectedComponentNumber G k H

/- The number of vertices in a k-connected component -/
def KConnectedComponentNumber (G : Graph α β) (k : ℕ) (H : Graph α β) : ℕ :=
  if H.IsKConnectedCompOf G k then (V H).encard else 0

/- The sum of k-connected component numbers over all k-connected components of G -/
noncomputable def KConnectedComponentSum (G : Graph α β) (k : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  ∑ H ∈ KConnectedComponents G k, KConnectedComponentNumber G k H
